question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DomainUtils.java -> Scope: '] [Function: toEvmAddress(ContractID)] Can an unprivileged external user submit a ContractID with EVM_ADDRESS case containing an empty ByteString, causing toEvmAddress() to return Internal.EMPTY_BYTE_ARRAY (the shared public mutable constant), and if any downstream code mutates this array, it corrupts the global EMPTY_BYTE_ARRAY constant?
